name: Pizza Spaghetti Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, salt, pepper and evaporated milk in a bowl. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes until set.
4. Remove from oven and spoon off drippings.
5. In another bowl, combine spaghetti with egg, Parmesan cheese, and butter.
6. Spread the mixture over the baked meat shell.
7. Top with pizza sauce, oregano, green pepper rings, and mozzarella cheese.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting into wedges.
